response.justification: Candidate is a strong individual contributor with 15+ years of software development experience and some adjacent dev-tooling work (MCP generators, CI/CD setup, custom test runner), but the resume shows no people-management or team-leadership tenure, no formal organizational-change leadership, and only thin mobile-platform exposure. The role is explicitly a people-leadership position (1:1s, performance feedback, team roadmap) where this gap is disqualifying without further signal.
strengths: Long, broad engineering track record across web, backend, mobile and embedded
Hands-on developer-tooling work: test runner (Trial), assertion lib, CI/GitLab setup, MCP codegen
Demonstrated teaching/community leadership via workshops, courses and dojos
concerns: No explicit people-management or direct-reports experience (role requires 2+ years)
No evidence of leading organizational change or owning a team's mid-term roadmap
Mobile-platform ecosystem experience is limited to a brief iOS/Apple TV stint in 2015–2016

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling and testing infrastructure background
